top3.sql:
WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_orders
    FROM orders o
    GROUP BY o.employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    eos.employeeid,
    eos.late_orders,
    ROUND(100.0 * eos.late_orders / eos.total_orders, 2) AS late_order_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats eos
ORDER BY late_order_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        SUM(CASE WHEN shippeddate >= requireddate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_orders
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    employeeid,
    late_orders,
    ROUND(late_orders * 100.0 / total_orders, 2) AS late_order_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats
ORDER BY late_order_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate IS NOT NULL AND o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_orders
    FROM orders o
    GROUP BY o.employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    eos.employeeid,
    eos.late_orders,
    ROUND(100.0 * eos.late_orders / eos.total_orders, 2) AS late_order_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats eos
ORDER BY late_order_percentage DESC, eos.employeeid...

final.sql:
WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_orders
    FROM orders o
    GROUP BY o.employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    eos.employeeid,
    eos.late_orders,
    ROUND(100.0 * eos.late_orders / eos.total_orders, 2) AS late_order_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats eos
ORDER BY late_order_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;
